response.global_analysis: The video segment features a performance of 'TROUBLE "WAN"DER!' by Inugami Korone followed by a merchandise announcement. The song is primarily in English, and I have strictly followed the burnt-in on-screen lyrics for transcription, overriding discrepancies in the Reference JSON (e.g., at 01:06). Timing is precisely aligned with the vocal audio waveform. The dialogue segment has been transcribed from Japanese and translated into English, ensuring semantic continuity and accurate representation of the merchandise names shown on screen.

subtitles.original: みんな、今日は見てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you for watching today!

subtitles.original: いつものころねもパペットのころねも可愛かったでしょ？
subtitles.english: Both the usual Korone and the puppet Korone were cute, weren't they?

subtitles.original: ということで、ここでグッズ紹介です！
subtitles.english: And with that, it's time to introduce the merchandise!

subtitles.original: 戌神ころね活動6周年記念グッズが出ます！
subtitles.english: Inugami Korone 6th Anniversary merchandise is coming out!

subtitles.original: まず初めに、ころさんのパペットシアターB2タペストリー！
subtitles.english: First up, Koro-san's Puppet Theater B2 Tapestry!

subtitles.original: 今回の配信に寄せて作ってもらいました。描き下ろしはフカヒレ先生です。いつもありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: It was made especially for this stream. The illustration is by Fukahire-sensei. Thank you as always!

subtitles.original: 続いて、ころさんの耳カチューシャ！
subtitles.english: Next, Koro-san's Ear Headband!

subtitles.original: 某遊園地で売ってる耳が好きなので作ってもらいました。
subtitles.english: I love the headbands sold at a certain amusement park, so I had this made.

subtitles.original: 続いて、毛玉ころねクリップ付きぬいぐるみ！
subtitles.english: Next, the Kedama Korone Plushie with clip!

subtitles.original: これは肩につけることもできるので、お供にしてお出かけしてください。
subtitles.english: You can attach this to your shoulder, so please take it with you on your outings.

subtitles.original: 続いて、こちら、ころねすきークリップ付きぬいぐるみ！
subtitles.english: Next is this, the Koronesuki Plushie with clip!

subtitles.original: 欲しい人がいるか分からないけど、ころねが欲しいので作ってもらいました。これも、お出かけしてください。
subtitles.english: I don't know if anyone wants it, but I wanted one, so I had it made. Please take this one out too.

subtitles.original: 全部買った方には、ステッカーと、ころねすきーへの感謝の言葉ボイスがつきますよ。
subtitles.english: If you buy the full set, it comes with a sticker and a thank-you message voice for the Koronesukis.

subtitles.original: 発売は9時からとなっております。よろしくね！
subtitles.english: Sales start from 9 PM. Don't miss out!
